title: carpha eminii var. angustissima
intro: Carpha eminii var. angustissima, commonly known as a species of grass, is a plant used in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Carpha eminii var. angustissima include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The therapeutic actions of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help in relieving congestion and promoting the expulsion of mucus from the respiratory tract. The bioactive constituents of Carpha eminii var. angustissima include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
